top_signals.title: White Sox slugger Munetaka Murakami to miss 4 to 6 weeks with hamstring strain
top_signals.summary: Murakami has hit 20 home runs in his first 57 MLB games.

top_signals.title: After the AI binge, companies balk at soaring bills
top_signals.summary: Playing by a well-worn Silicon Valley playbook, AI companies charged rock-bottom prices to hook customers after ChatGPT burst onto the scene.
